description: In the image, a man is seated on a couch in a living room setting. He is dressed in a yellow shirt and blue jeans. In front of him on the floor is a wooden coffee table. On top of the table, there are two objects: a black laptop and a blue cup. The room has a white wall with a window that lets in natural light. A curtain can be seen hanging from this window. The man appears to be engaged in some activity at his laptop.
